commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh 1 Chronicles 22:18 Is not the LORD your God with you. and has he not given you rest on every side. for he has given the inhabitants of the land into my hand; and the land is subdued before the LORD, and before his people. Saying is not expressed in Hebrew, "Is not the Lord " And hath. Hebrew, "for he hath given the inhabitants of the land into my hand "or power. (Haydock) Almost all the neighbouring nations were subjected to David. (Calmet) The Lord, who assisted his people, and filled the enemy with terror. (Menochius).
